scripts.compile: set APPDATA=.hardhat-global&& set LOCALAPPDATA=.hardhat-global&& hardhat compile
scripts.test: set APPDATA=.hardhat-global&& set LOCALAPPDATA=.hardhat-global&& hardhat test
scripts.deploy:sepolia: set APPDATA=.hardhat-global&& set LOCALAPPDATA=.hardhat-global&& hardhat run scripts/deploy.ts --network sepolia
scripts.deploy:registrar:sepolia: set APPDATA=.hardhat-global&& set LOCALAPPDATA=.hardhat-global&& hardhat run scripts/deploy-registrar.ts --network sepolia
scripts.build: set APPDATA=.hardhat-global&& set LOCALAPPDATA=.hardhat-global&& hardhat compile
scripts.lint: set APPDATA=.hardhat-global&& set LOCALAPPDATA=.hardhat-global&& hardhat compile
